basic_details.job_title: TNWeSafe Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Office Assistant, Administrative Officer and MorePosts
basic_details.organization_name: Tamil Nadu Women Employment and Safety Project (TNWeSafe)
basic_details.post_name: Administrative Officer, PC to Project Director, Office Assistant
basic_details.short_information: Tamil Nadu Women Employment and Safety Project (TNWeSafe) Administrative Officer, PC to Project Director, Office Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 10 July 2026 on the official website of TNWeSafe. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the TNWeSafe Administrative Officer, PC to Project Director, Office Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Administrative Officer: Bachelors/Master’s degree, Minimum 3 years of experience in similar roles, Proficient in IT/computer skills/file keeping procedures, Familiarity with Government work setup. PC to Project Director: Any Degree, Minimum 2 years of experience in similar roles, Proficient in IT or computer skills. Office Assistant: 10th pass.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for TNWeSafe Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.tamil_nadu_women_employment_and_safety_p: Administrative Officer, PC to Project Director, Office Assistant

content_sections.heading: TNWeSafe Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the TNWeSafe Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download TNWeSafe Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Administrative Officer: Bachelors/Master’s degree, Minimum 3 years of experience in similar roles, Proficient in IT/computer skills/file keeping procedures, Familiarity with Government work setup. PC to Project Director: Any Degree, Minimum 2 years of experience in similar roles, Proficient in IT or computer skills. Office Assistant: 10th pass.

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for TNWeSafe Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TNWeSafe Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive applications for the TNWeSafe Recruitment 2026 is 31st July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the TNWeSafe Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for the TNWeSafe Recruitment 2026, covering the posts of Administrative Officer, PC to Project Director, and Office Assistant.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the TNWeSafe Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary by post, ranging from 10th pass for Office Assistant, Any Degree for PC to Project Director, to Bachelors/Master’s degree for Administrative Officer.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for TNWeSafe Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the TNWeSafe Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 15,000/- per month for Office Assistant, Rs. 20,000/- for PC to Project Director, and Rs. 30,000/- for Administrative Officer.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the TNWeSafe Recruitment 2026 involves shortlisting of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Tamil Nadu Women Employment and Safety Project. Links are provided in the 'Important Links' section.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are contractual in nature, offering a fixed-term employment opportunity with the Tamil Nadu Women Employment and Safety Project.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The jobs are located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 600032.
